title: INC-207: No images in test report for thread yCmxs
error_message: Report for thread yCmxs shows no images. test_logs array truncated to steps 0-2, missing 151 steps including healing screenshots.

details.stack_trace: Step 18: LLM tapped container cell (element 8) instead of text input, navigating to wrong screen. No command_verifier to catch error. Step 19 failed (UNDOABLE). Healing session EXEC_FAILED. Report generation pipeline truncated test_logs to steps 0-2 only.
details.root_cause_analysis: The test_logs array is being truncated during report generation, preventing images from being included. The healing screenshots exist but are not surfaced in the report UI because they're not in the test_logs array.
suggested_fixes: Fix test_logs truncation in report generation pipeline
Surface healing screenshots in report UI
Add command_verifier to search field tap steps
Improve LLM element selection for search fields
